source: public issue, external maintainer note, public post, or private-redacted adoption receipt
artifacts: public release asset URL or release tag

artifactExpectations: generated ShipGuard report or validation output
public release asset URL, release tag, issue, PR, post, or redacted external receipt
adoptionEvidenceChecklist.passDecision: Pass only when a non-maintainer actor supplies redacted/public command and artifact evidence for real ShipGuard use.

outcome: Describe what the independent actor used ShipGuard for and what passed or failed. Remove private app names, local paths, screenshots, identifiers, tokens, and account data.
nonClaims: Does not prove OpenAI marketplace acceptance.
Does not prove private target-app quality.
Does not include private app source, paths, screenshots, identifiers, or secrets.
templateInstructions: Set status to pass only after real independent adoption evidence exists.
Set privateDataRedacted to true only after reviewing the record for local paths, private app identifiers, screenshots, token-like strings, and account data.
Use evidenceClass public-external for public evidence or private-redacted-external for private evidence summarized without sensitive details.
